description: Reference example of engine-side defaults consumed by an OPF runtime. Not part of the OPF document contract - engines load this file (or their own copy) at startup to fall back when an OPF document doesn't specify a value. There is no companion JSON Schema for this file: it is engine config, not a catalog record. Every catalog-referencing value below is resolved through the catalog system the same way an explicit reference in an OPF document would be (inline catalogs.<kind>.records[] -> catalogs.<kind>.source -> default catalog at https://www.pptx.gallery/<kind>). The optional catalogs.<kind>.source overrides below let a deployment redirect all default catalog fetches at once (e.g., to an internal mirror or local package), without each OPF document needing its own catalogs block. The 'chartTypes' array is in priority order: chartTypes[0] is the engine's primary chart type, chartTypes[1] secondary, chartTypes[2] tertiary.
